diagrams.title: Wireframe Layout Template
diagrams.description: A basic wireframe showing common UI elements placement
diagrams.purpose: Shows structural layout without visual decoration - foundation for UI design

diagrams.title: User Flow Diagram
diagrams.description: Arrow-based flow showing user navigation path through screens
diagrams.purpose: Visualizes how users navigate through the interface and identify all possible paths

diagrams.title: Low-Fi vs High-Fi Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of sketch fidelity levels
elements: Low-fi: basic boxes, X marks, simple lines
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrates progression from rough exploration to refined design visualization

diagrams.title: Crazy 8s Fold Template
diagrams.description: Paper folded into 8 equal sections for timed sketching
diagrams.purpose: Template for rapid ideation exercise encouraging quick creative thinking

diagrams.title: Annotation Symbols Legend
diagrams.description: Common symbols used in UI sketches to indicate functionality
diagrams.purpose: Provides standardized notation for communicating interactions in sketches
